structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-06 Pima  Tucson Lighthouse 7.0
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-06 12:59:35-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Lighthouse 7.0 is here!!  The rate has been locked at 6.00%!  Reservations for Lighthouse will be available tomorrow 03/07.

 

General Eligibility

*	First-time homebuyers (some exceptions apply) *
*	Government loans only (FHA, VA, USDA)
*	Valid in Tucson & Pima County only**
*	Must apply & gain approval prior to home closing
*	Cannot be combined with other federally secured products (i.e., Mortgage Credit Certificate)

 

*Applicants who are military veterans or who purchase in target areas do not have to be first-time homebuyers.

** Please confirm the subject property address is in an eligible area prior to reserving funds**

 

 

Program Highlights

*	4% down payment assistance
*	Fully forgivable after 5 years
*	Homebuyer education requirements
*	Income and purchase price limits apply
*	45% DTI with 640-679 FICO
*	50% DTI with 680+ FICO
*	MFH with 660 FICO and 45% DTI

 

 

 

Income and Purchase Price Limits <https://www.ehousingplus.com/wp-content/uploads/Lighthouse-Income-PP-09-10-24.pdf> 

 

Here’s a link to the updated Training Guide:   Pima Tucson Lighthouse 7.0 - Structuring in Encompass.pdf <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/EWjYH_ybvbtAmWunv1a7KscBitbo974m1fymXiXw3aqfAg?e=whcR2h> 

 

 

 

Attachments

*	Program Guidelines

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
